scripts.free-ports: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ports=5173,5174,5175,8080; foreach($p in $ports){Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }}"
scripts.dev:clean: npm run free-ports && npm run dev
